case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JOHM SHEPPARD et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DAILY RENTAL VALUE $62.50 PER DAY AS TO DEFENDANT SHEPPARD, JOHM

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEPPARD, JOHM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 66 F YERBA BUENA ROAD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94130, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
